title: More than a good boy: How Murphy is changing what well-being looks like in Purdue Engineering
summary_en: Murphy lives with Kristy Eaton, director of the Purdue Engineering's Community, Assistance and Resources for Engineering Students (CARES), and visits campus regularly to do what research says therapy dogs do best: make people feel calmer, happier and less alone.
title_cn: 不止于“好帮手”：墨菲如何重塑普渡大学工程学院的福祉内涵

title: AAE's Moses completes the crew of the Virgin Galactic all-Boilermaker spaceflight
summary_en: Purdue University is set to send five Boilermakers on a research journey into space with the announcement of the final two crew members to take part in a Virgin Galactic suborbital flight mission.
title_cn: AAE所属摩西完成维珍银河“全锅炉工号”航天飞行乘组配置

title: Purdue Engineering launches free AI bootcamp to build job-ready competency ahead of university-wide requirement
summary_en: As artificial intelligence reshapes industries from manufacturing floors to hospital operating rooms, Purdue Engineering is making sure its students and the broader public are prepared.
title_cn: 普渡大学工程学院推出免费人工智能集训营 于全校统一要求落地前培育就业适配胜任力
